title: How can I see which update mails are sent?

posts.author: HarmLommers (Harm Lommers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m wondering if it is possible to see which mails are sent based on posted updates?

I now always add ‘@person’ to a comment just make sure it’s sent, but I think all users already in a update conversation get an update mail. But I’m not sure…

I have this more often, and therefore I’d like to see what emails are sent from a board.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @HarmLommers! To ensure your team members are notified via email, they must ensure they have their email notifications set up accordingly via their Profile > Notifications.

  • Email notifications

Additionally, if you’d like board subscribers to be notified each time an update is created, you can actually set this up via an automation:

Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 10.18.14 am878×730 33.3 KB

That said, as mentioned above, those users will need to ensure they have their email notifications set to receive emails for automated notifications:

Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 10.19.06 am944×762 47.5 KB

Let me know if this helps!
